name: @broberg/auth
description: Thin fleet wrapper around Better Auth — one createAuth() for email+password, magic-link (via @broberg/mail), social login (Google/Apple/GitHub/Microsoft/LinkedIn/Facebook) and passkey/WebAuthn, with dark-ship provider guards and Hono + Next mount helpers. Runs in your own app/DB — no external service.
peerDependenciesComment: better-auth is a peer so the consumer pins ONE version shared between this server wrapper and better-auth/client on the frontend. @broberg/mail is an optional peer — only needed when you enable magic-link (you pass the Mailer in; we import its type only).
